completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented --zot flag for /research, /plan, and /implement commands by writing zotero-retrieve.sh (6-field weighted scoring, chunk reading, token budgeting), wiring zot_flag through 3 command files and 3 skill files, threading zot_flag through all 12 dispatch locations in skill-orchestrate, and updating EXTENSION.md and retrieval-flags.md documentation.

memory_candidates.content: The --zot flag injection pattern for Zotero context follows --lit exactly: (1) parse flag in command file Stage 1.5, (2) pass zot_flag in delegation args, (3) retrieve in skill Stage 4a via zotero-retrieve.sh, (4) inject in Stage 5 prompt. skill-orchestrate requires 12 injection points matching lit_flag count (grep -c 'lit_flag' to verify parity).

artifacts.summary: Zotero context injection implementation summary covering all 4 phases and 9 modified files
Core retrieval script with 6-field scoring, chunk reading, and token budgeting
Copy of zotero-retrieve.sh installed for skill consumption
